title: Harvestable Flowers
description: Harvestable Flowers allows you to get flowers by using bone meal on it.
body:
![Harvestable Flowers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/imtoby7/HarvestableFlowers/main/logo.png)
# About **Harvestable Flowers** allows you to get flowers by using bone meal on it. # License Harvestable Flowers is licensed under the [MIT](https://github.com/imtoby7/HarvestableFlowers) license. You can use it in modpacks, reviews, or any other form as long as you follow what the [MIT](HarvestableFlowers) license requires.
